calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:49am

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, appears through council James Hann. Respondent, Yong Seok Yang appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

Both parties have interpreters who have been duly sworn.
Witness, Ms. Moody, testifies as to her knowledge of the club.

Attorney James Hann is instructed to send information to Mr. Yang regarding the class action pending in Santa Clara county, including a list of plaintiffs council. There is no evidence of a loan agreement between parties therefore Judge Jungreis ruled in favor of Respondent with $0.00 judgment.

11:10am
Matter is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Judgment Entered
